name: Northern Commission Salesperson — T2222, T777, and Territorial Taxes
description: Complete Marcus Tremblay's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\. Save the completed return as 'marcus_tremblay.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4044 (Employment Expenses) and Form T2222 (Northern Residents)
metadata.key_complexity: T2222 basic and additional residency amounts + travel; T777 commission employee expenses (50% meals, advertising); Northwest Territories jurisdiction; Medical travel vs Northern travel distinction
